default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Flosum and explore potential collaboration to improve Flosum's brand awareness and visibility in the Salesforce ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Flosum aims to increase brand awareness, particularly in the Salesforce data backup space where they're less known](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation, SEO, and link-building services with a focus on high-quality, comprehensive content](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves minimal client time commitment (about 30 min/week) but requires initial context-sharing and ongoing calibration](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Flosum is interested in starting with a focus on data backup content to improve visibility in that space](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)

## Topics

### Flosum's Current Marketing Challenges

  - [Considered a "best-kept secret" in the Salesforce ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Often not invited to "dance parties" (RFPs) due to low awareness](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Primarily growing through sales-led approach with a small marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Developing a new product with reduced friction and partial free offering](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Currently using freelance content writers but lacking desired velocity and quality](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### GrowthX's Content Marketing Approach

  - [Uses AI-powered workflows to generate comprehensive, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focuses on understanding personas, jobs-to-be-done, and creating targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Employs a three-phase approach: content production, traffic growth, and conversion optimization](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Utilizes advanced research methods to create in-depth, citation-rich content](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Aims to become the most comprehensive answer for specific topics in search results](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### GrowthX's Team and Expertise

  - [Leadership team includes former executives from TechCrunch, Finextra, TripAdvisor, and other major tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Employs advanced AI and infrastructure, with engineering talent from HashiCorp and Stripe](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Serves clients like Abnormal Security, Webflow, Reddit, and other technical B2B companies](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Collaboration Process and Client Involvement

  - [GrowthX handles most of the heavy lifting in content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Requires about 30 minutes per week from the client for syncs and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Needs initial onboarding with context about the company, products, and customer pain points](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Suggests involving customer success and sales teams to share insights on winning deals](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Content Strategy for Flosum

  - [Girish suggests focusing deeply on data backup content initially](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1956.0)
  - [Plan to build brand awareness in data backup, then upsell to DevOps solutions](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [GrowthX recommends starting with 2-3 content pillars or clusters](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send a proposal with a suggested kick-off date](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Flosum team to a shared Slack channel for communication](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [Flosum to review the proposal and consider which team members to involve (potentially including Joe Morse as an SME)](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=1775.0)
  - [Flosum to decide on proceeding with the engagement, considering the urgency of their marketing needs](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=2017.0)
  - [If moving forward, schedule a kick-off meeting to begin the collaboration process](https://fathom.video/share/AwxwihxSP6z9PhmTSZwcYEJvhcWrwEC-?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)

action_items.description: Send SOW (Statement of Work) to Flosum team
Add Flosum team to shared Slack channel w/ GrowthX
Send meeting recording to Flosum team
Send sample proposal w/ proposed kickoff date to Flosum team
